edges.to_label: Go increase the size of the pie if you want a bigger share. Collaborative-growth over zero-sum. **2026-04 live evidence: this repo (agamarora/agamarora) is open-source as a direct application of this principle.**
Build to validate; don't just conceptualize. The prototype is the argument. (Absorbs former tinker-publicly belief as loop-closure framing per A3.)
Start thinking agent-first — both building and serving lens. Platforms that cannot talk to autonomous agents are behind.
We need to kill prompting. (Stance evolved per A1: prompting → context engineering → harness engineering. Verdict held; layer migrated.)
Spec > Sprint. When you have specced every pixel, a generative tool gives you a worse version of what you already decided.

Individual Contributor path is a valid career arc. People management is critical but not for everyone. **2026 reframe: AI-era amplifies IC leverage — IC + AI agents = throughput closer to a small team than ever.**
You are a brand, and you should have your own nameplate. Ship it.

edges.from_one_line: Platforms that cannot talk to autonomous agents are already behind. The prompting skill layer migrated; the verdict held.
edges.to_label: Enterprise AI reality - ships vs demos
edges.to_one_line: Roughly 80% of enterprise AI experiments don't reach production. Moats are infrastructure, talent, data: model is not on the list.

edges.from_one_line: Platforms that cannot talk to autonomous agents are already behind. The prompting skill layer migrated; the verdict held.
edges.to_label: Spec first, taste always - the builder trilogy
edges.to_one_line: Spec > Sprint. Taste > Execution. Context > Prompt. Lived since 2021, named April 2026. Same disposition, sharper words.

edges.from_label: Voice AI craft - cost, latency, scale
edges.from_one_line: Voice AI is a distinct engineering discipline with its own constraints. Under-share on LinkedIn is deliberate; case study is on agamarora.com /lab.
edges.to_label: LinkedIn as instrument - the meta-platform game
edges.to_one_line: Platform to be gamed productively. Posting IS the thinking. Loop closes when others learn (build → post → teach → learn → build).

edges.from_one_line: Breadth differentiates. Depth makes it matter. Humanness-as-depth (EQ, taste, judgment) is the AI-era axis.
edges.to_label: Career reflection - IC path, learning, market lift
edges.to_one_line: IC path is legitimate; AI-era amplifies IC leverage. Help the market flourish (this repo open-source is the proof). Learn concepts not tools.

edges.from_label: PM taste - craft, metaphors, what a PM actually does
edges.from_one_line: PM is taste of what to build, what experience, what value. 99% should-we, 1% can-we. Strong opinion about not having strong opinions licenses everything else.
edges.to_label: Spec first, taste always - the builder trilogy
edges.to_one_line: Spec > Sprint. Taste > Execution. Context > Prompt. Lived since 2021, named April 2026. Same disposition, sharper words.

edges.from_one_line: Built for me, hobbyist scope, Karpathy-inspired. Personal context layer for AI sessions. Pattern probably generalizes for builders.
